my_events.title: My events
my_events.schedule_description: All your events in one simple schedule

hero.title: Sustainable Events & Workshops
hero.subtitle: Join our community of eco-conscious creators. Learn, share, and impact the world through meaningful experiences.

categories.explore_description: Explore our collection of {{category}} events. Join workshops, conferences, and meetups to learn new skills and connect with the community.

how_it_works.title: How does it work?
how_it_works.subtitle: Joining the upcycling movement is as easy as 1-2-3 (and 4). Here's your roadmap to our events.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Browse our workshops, meetups, and conferences. There's something for every eco-soul!
how_it_works.step2_desc: Secure your place with one click. Psst... most of our events are totally free!
how_it_works.step3_desc: Keep track of all your upcoming fun in your personal <1>My Planning</1> page.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Learn new skills, meet amazing makers, and share your upcycling story with the world!
